task_summary: SP32 added --wisp as a named resident launch preset that defaults omitted options to the live human cat foreground watch surface while preserving explicit format/form/watch-count and fixture-terminal behavior.

tests_run.result: live --wisp preset rendered the centered cat resident and HUD through a bounded watch iteration
fixture-terminal --wisp kept deterministic local fixture rendering without live desk reads

proof_artifacts: live and fixture --wisp terminal smoke outputs inspected
notes: Mew authored the source, README, and focused test patch. The first README-only edit hit the existing README usage assertion and rolled back; mew reread the test tail, repaired the expected usage list, and completed without supervisor product-code rescue.
